data.title: Gold miner Franco-Nevada and 12 other growth stocks hit record highs, leading top stock list rankings.
data.description: Today, several top-performing stocks have been newly included in prominent stock lists such as the IBD 50, Big Cap 20, and Stock Spotlight. Franco-Nevada, a gold mining company, has surged to a record high, spearheading a group of 12 promising growth stocks onto these acclaimed lists. This development reflects the continued success and potential of these companies in the current market environment. Investors are keeping a keen eye on these stocks for potential returns and growth opportunities.

data.title: Mission Bank opens new office in North San Luis Obispo County with Loan and Deposit Production team led by Mark Pearce.
data.description: In January 12, 2026, Mission Bank announced their expansion in the Central Coast by introducing a Loan and Deposit Production team in North San Luis Obispo County. Mark Pearce heads the team, assisted by Relationship Managers Sarah Kramer. This move aims to strengthen Mission Bank's presence in the region and boost their lending and deposit services, catering to the growing population in North San Luis Obispo County.

data.title: Atkore Inc. (NYSE: ATKR) to release Q1 FY 2026 results on Feb 3, 2026, and hold conference call at 8:00 a.m. (ET).
data.description: Atkore Inc., a prominent electrical products manufacturer catering to various sectors such as commercial, industrial, data center, telecommunications, and solar applications, disclosed its plan to unveil the financial results for the First Quarter of Fiscal Year 2026 on Tuesday, February 3, 2026, prior to the market opening. Following this release, the Company is scheduled to conduct a conference call at 8:00 a.m. (ET) on the same day to delve into the details of the results.
